(sha=03f29f573866ede53b7bc34bddb5f09eb1c388cc)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes OpenAI plugin response parsing to use `readResponseWithLimit` with 1 MiB caps in realtime secrets, OAuth token exchange, image generation, and embedding batch status/file reads.

PR surface: Source +35. Total +35 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source. The PR head applies a 1 MiB cap to image and batch file-content success bodies, while current source/docs show those paths carry large base64 image and batch output payloads; OAuth also still prebuffers in `postTokenForm` before the changed parse.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action and maintainer review are needed because the PR lacks real behavior proof and has cap-size/placement blockers; ClawSweeper should not start repair automation while the proof gate is missing.

target.title: fix(openai): bound JSON/text response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Replace unbounded `await response.json()`/`text()` with `readResponseWithLimit`
(1 MiB cap) across OpenAI realtime/oauth/image-generation/embedding-batch providers
(6 call sites in 4 files) — the symmetric counterpart to bound-stream work in
#95420, #95417, #95218.

A malicious or faulty OpenAI API endpoint returning an oversized response body would
previously buffer the entire body in memory before parsing.

## Evidence

- **Static checks**: `npx oxlint` exits 0 on changed files; `git diff --check` clean
- **Prior art**: follows the same bounded-read pattern established by #95420, #95417,
  #95418, #95218 — 1 MiB cap is safe for OAuth tokens, batch status metadata, and
  image generation API responses
- **Negative control**: reverting any JSON/text read back to `await response.json()`
  or `await response.text()` would allow an oversized streamed body to buffer
  without bound

## Summary

Bound 6 unbounded JSON/text response reads in OpenAI providers with 1 MiB cap.

## Changes

- **`extensions/openai/realtime-provider-shared.ts`** — bound ephemeral token JSON
  response read
- **`extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.ts`** — bound token exchange
  JSON reads (2 call sites)
- **`extensions/openai/image-generation-provider.ts`** — bound image generation JSON
  response read
- **`extensions/openai/embedding-batch.ts`** — bound batch status JSON and file
  content text reads (2 call sites, both in parse callbacks)
target.author: lsr911
